fault_hypothesis: On line 66, the fee is not deducted from the total before computing shares. The formula computes `(r / total_ratio) * total` instead of `(r / total_ratio) * (total - fee)`, so the fee is subtracted per-share on line 70 rather than once from the pool.

constraints.intent: After computing shares, their sum should equal (total - fee), not total, when fee > 0.
The raw shares should sum to (total - fee) since the fee is a one-time pool deduction.
The floored shares should sum to (total - fee) before being returned.
The returned shares must sum to total minus fee (or zero if that is negative).
